title: Our Four Key Themes
summary:
Main
The four things investors need to know, over the medium term:
Central banks have shifted focus from inflation to growth - with inflation ostensibly under control, central banks stand ready to provide stimulus to support growth. The "New New Normal"… is the "Old Normal"- markets need less intervention from policymakers. No more zero rates and negligible inflation.
